name: denys-fast-mskills
description: Denis's m_* toolkit for Claude Code: plan -> execute -> verify (m_plan), deploy/infra context commands, Playwright full-test loop, the m_code code-quality framework (rules, hooks, agents, verification), a branded end-of-turn summary widget (Stop hook, jsDelivr-hosted renderer — near-zero tokens per turn), and m_verify — a feature-verification manager fed by the hook that auto-checks what AI can, hands the user a minimal human checklist, and spawns background repair agents.
